checks.name: Application boots with 110 controls and consistent v1.8.3 identity
Four modules receive exactly 440 stable requirement records
Parent change creates a pending impact without overwriting the child snapshot
Stale records are grouped by source module with field-level impact
Defer records rationale, reviewer, source fingerprint, and preserves the child snapshot
A newer parent change reopens a previously deferred decision
Preserve explicitly acknowledges the change without copying source values
Refresh is explicit and copies current source values while clearing any override
Refreshing inherited base fields preserves the separate local supplement
Local-override collision is detected and can be escalated without propagation
Preserve, defer, and escalate reject missing rationale
v1.8.2 schema migrates to 1.3.0 and derives pending impacts without decisions
Portfolio 1.3 JSON round trip preserves module and impact records
